RunStatus.description:
Lifecycle status of a managed audit run.

Canonical values for run_status.json and artifact manifests.

Decision: Pre-Phase-5 producers emit "in_progress" (legacy).
The contract canonicalises this to RUNNING. Phase 5 must switch
producers to emit "running". IN_PROGRESS_LEGACY is accepted
during the transition period by readers but must not be emitted
by compliant producers.
RunStatus.title: RunStatus

description:
Schema for run_status.json as defined by the managed-repo audit contract.

All managed-repo producers must conform to this schema after Phase 5.
OpsCenter reads this file first; the artifact_manifest_path field
leads to the artifact manifest.

Generic fields: applicable to any managed repo.
Producer-specific fields may be added in metadata.

contract_name.description: Identifies this as a managed-repo-audit contract file.
contract_name.title: Contract Name

producer.description: Managed repo identifier as configured in the operator's binding.
producer.title: Producer

repo_id.description: Stable repo identifier matching the managed repo config.
repo_id.title: Repo Id

run_id.description: UUID hex generated by OperationsCenter before invocation.
run_id.title: Run Id

status.description: Run lifecycle status. Canonical values: pending, running, completed, failed, interrupted, unknown. Legacy: 'in_progress' (pre-Phase-5 producers).

current_phase.description: Current named phase within the run, if available.
current_phase.title: Current Phase

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run started.
started_at.title: Started At

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent status update.
updated_at.title: Updated At

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run reached a terminal state.
completed_at.title: Completed At

artifact_manifest_path.description: Path to artifact_manifest.json for this run. REQUIRED for all managed runs after Phase 5 implementation. None only during the pre-Phase-5 transition period.
artifact_manifest_path.title: Artifact Manifest Path

metadata.description: Producer-specific metadata (not read by generic OpsCenter logic).
metadata.title: Metadata

title: ManagedRunStatus
